targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant),0) AS ca FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
SELECT count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)) AS tickets FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

SELECT round(SUM(montant)/NULLIF(count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)),0),2) AS panier FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
SELECT round(SUM(poids_gramme)/1000.0,0) AS kg FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

SELECT round(SUM(montant) FILTER (WHERE poids_gramme>0)/NULLIF(SUM(poids_gramme) FILTER (WHERE poids_gramme>0)/1000.0,0),2) AS prix_kg FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

SELECT round(100.0*SUM(montant) FILTER (WHERE n_plu IN ('0','1001'))/NULLIF(SUM(montant),0),1) AS part_libre FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
SELECT date_vente::timestamp AS "time", SUM(montant) AS ca FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_vente::timestamp AS "time", count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)) AS tickets FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_vente::timestamp AS "time", SUM(SUM(montant)) OVER (ORDER BY date_vente) AS ca_cumule FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY date_vente ORDER BY date_vente

SELECT date_vente::timestamp AS "time", round(SUM(montant)/NULLIF(count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)),0),2) AS panier FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY date_vente ORDER BY date_vente

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('week',date_vente),'DD/MM') AS semaine, SUM(montant) AS ca FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY date_trunc('week',date_vente) ORDER BY date_trunc('week',date_vente)

SELECT CASE extract(isodow from date_vente) WHEN 1 THEN 'Lundi' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mardi' WHEN 3 THEN 'Mercredi' WHEN 4 THEN 'Jeudi' WHEN 5 THEN 'Vendredi' WHEN 6 THEN 'Samedi' WHEN 7 THEN 'Dimanche' END AS jour, SUM(montant) AS ca FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY extract(isodow from date_vente) ORDER BY extract(isodow from date_vente)

SELECT CASE extract(isodow from date_vente) WHEN 1 THEN 'Lundi' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mardi' WHEN 3 THEN 'Mercredi' WHEN 4 THEN 'Jeudi' WHEN 5 THEN 'Vendredi' WHEN 6 THEN 'Samedi' WHEN 7 THEN 'Dimanche' END AS jour, count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)) AS tickets FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY extract(isodow from date_vente) ORDER BY extract(isodow from date_vente)

panels.title: Panier moyen par jour de semaine

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE extract(isodow from date_vente) WHEN 1 THEN 'Lundi' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mardi' WHEN 3 THEN 'Mercredi' WHEN 4 THEN 'Jeudi' WHEN 5 THEN 'Vendredi' WHEN 6 THEN 'Samedi' WHEN 7 THEN 'Dimanche' END AS jour, round(SUM(montant)/NULLIF(count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)),0),2) AS panier FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY extract(isodow from date_vente) ORDER BY extract(isodow from date_vente)

panels.title: CA par heure de la journée

targets.rawSql: SELECT lpad(extract(hour from horodatage)::int::text,2,'0')||'h' AS heure, SUM(montant) AS ca FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND horodatage IS NOT NULL AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tickets par heure de la journée

targets.rawSql: SELECT lpad(extract(hour from horodatage)::int::text,2,'0')||'h' AS heure, count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)) AS tickets FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND horodatage IS NOT NULL AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Affluence : tickets par jour × tranche horaire

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE extract(isodow from date_vente) WHEN 1 THEN 'Lundi' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mardi' WHEN 3 THEN 'Mercredi' WHEN 4 THEN 'Jeudi' WHEN 5 THEN 'Vendredi' WHEN 6 THEN 'Samedi' WHEN 7 THEN 'Dimanche' END AS jour, count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)) FILTER (WHERE extract(hour from horodatage)<10) AS "Matin (-10h)", count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)) FILTER (WHERE extract(hour from horodatage) BETWEEN 10 AND 12) AS "Midi (10-13h)", count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)) FILTER (WHERE extract(hour from horodatage) BETWEEN 13 AND 15) AS "Après-midi (13-16h)", count(DISTINCT (id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket)) FILTER (WHERE extract(hour from horodatage)>=16) AS "Soir (16h+)" FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND horodatage IS NOT NULL AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY extract(isodow from date_vente) ORDER BY extract(isodow from date_vente)

options.content: ⚠️ **Couverture PLU limitée** — environ **89 % du CA est saisi en « prix libre »** (sans code article). Les graphiques ci-dessous ne portent donc que sur les **~11 % d'articles réellement codés PLU** : ils montrent des *tendances* (quels articles codés marchent le mieux), pas les parts de marché réelles de chaque famille.

targets.rawSql: SELECT f.nom AS famille, SUM(v.montant) AS ca FROM vente_ligne v JOIN produit p ON p.code_plu=v.n_plu JOIN famille f ON f.id=p.famille_id WHERE v.annule=false AND v.date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT f.nom AS famille, round(SUM(v.poids_gramme)/1000.0,1) AS kg FROM vente_ligne v JOIN produit p ON p.code_plu=v.n_plu JOIN famille f ON f.id=p.famille_id WHERE v.annule=false AND v.date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT p.nom AS produit, SUM(v.montant) AS ca, round(SUM(v.poids_gramme)/1000.0,1) AS kg FROM vente_ligne v JOIN produit p ON p.code_plu=v.n_plu WHERE v.annule=false AND v.date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY p.nom ORDER BY ca DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT p.nom AS produit, round(SUM(v.poids_gramme)/1000.0,1) AS kg, SUM(v.montant) AS ca FROM vente_ligne v JOIN produit p ON p.code_plu=v.n_plu WHERE v.annule=false AND v.poids_gramme>0 AND v.date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY p.nom ORDER BY kg DESC LIMIT 12

panels.title: Prix moyen au kg par famille (PLU)

targets.rawSql: SELECT f.nom AS famille, round(SUM(v.montant) FILTER (WHERE v.poids_gramme>0)/NULLIF(SUM(v.poids_gramme) FILTER (WHERE v.poids_gramme>0)/1000.0,0),2) AS prix_kg FROM vente_ligne v JOIN produit p ON p.code_plu=v.n_plu JOIN famille f ON f.id=p.famille_id WHERE v.annule=false AND v.date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(v.poids_gramme) FILTER (WHERE v.poids_gramme>0)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

options.content: ⚠️ **Marge indicative uniquement.** Deux limites : (1) seules les ventes codées PLU (~11 %) sont rattachées à une famille ; (2) peu de factures d'achat sont saisies pour l'instant. Le « CA HT rattaché » ne représente donc qu'une fraction des ventes réelles de la famille — **ne pas lire ces chiffres comme une marge nette**. La fiabilité progressera à mesure que les achats seront saisis et que davantage de ventes passeront par des codes PLU.

panels.title: Coût d'achat HT par famille (achats saisis)

targets.rawSql: SELECT f.nom AS famille, SUM(al.montant_ht) AS cout_ht FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id JOIN famille f ON f.id=al.famille_id WHERE al.famille_id IS NOT NULL AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT fo.nom AS fournisseur, SUM(a.montant_ht) AS achats_ht FROM achat a JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE a.montant_ht IS NOT NULL AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Marge indicative par famille (CA HT rattaché PLU − coût d'achat HT)

targets.rawSql: WITH ca AS (SELECT p.famille_id fid, SUM(v.montant/1.055) ca_ht FROM vente_ligne v JOIN produit p ON p.code_plu=v.n_plu WHERE v.annule=false AND p.famille_id IS NOT NULL AND v.date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1), ach AS (SELECT al.famille_id fid, SUM(al.montant_ht) cout FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id WHERE al.famille_id IS NOT NULL AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1) SELECT f.nom AS famille, round(COALESCE(ca.ca_ht,0),0) AS ca_ht_rattache, round(COALESCE(ach.cout,0),0) AS cout_achat_ht, round(COALESCE(ca.ca_ht,0)-COALESCE(ach.cout,0),0) AS marge_indicative, f.marge_cible AS cible_pct FROM famille f LEFT JOIN ca ON ca.fid=f.id LEFT JOIN ach ON ach.fid=f.id WHERE COALESCE(ca.ca_ht,0)<>0 OR COALESCE(ach.cout,0)<>0 ORDER BY marge_indicative DESC

SELECT 'Vendeur '||COALESCE(numero_vendeur,'?') AS vendeur, SUM(montant) AS ca FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT SUM(montant) AS montant_ticket FROM vente_ligne WHERE annule=false AND date_vente BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY id_sd_device,numero_rapport_z,numero_ticket
